text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ugh! My cheeks are still all dry!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This is so weird... I even used my universal magic
potion that cures anything...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Did I get the ingredients wrong?!
Agh, those were the wrong leaves?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out the extracts Sweep Tosho used to
make her potion have been having an adverse
effect on her skin.
